title: Moritz & Moritz 4x Kitchen Drawer Liners 50x150cm - Anti-Slip Liners for Drawers - As Shelf Liners or Drawer Mat - incl. 20 Board Labels
features: ANTI-SLIP - The anti-slip coating of the Moritz & Moritz drawer mat prevents pots and cutlery from slipping into drawers and thus helps to create more order. Scope of supply: 4 rolls each 150 x 50 cm, 20 board sticker

SCRATCH PROTECTION - The cupboard liners for kitchen cabinets not only protects the glass shelves in the refrigerator from scratches, but also sensitive surfaces in the wardrobe, bathroom cabinet and shoe rack
UNIVERSAL - The anti-slip kitchen cabinet liner can be easily cut to the desired size with scissors. The anti-slip mat lies flat onto your drawer, no annoying rolling up of the edges

HYGIENICALLY CLEAN - The Moritz & Moritz drawer film can be cut to size as desired, can be removed without any residue, contains non-toxic and odourless PVC material, is easy to clean with a damp cloth and is therefore perfect for kitchen drawers, cupbeards, shelfs and so on
VERSATILE - Transparent non slip drawer liners for household, office, workshop, trunk, ideal also in motorhomes
description: Product Description Moritz & Moritz drawer mat and 20 blackboard stickers Wherever things of daily use are loosely and unsecured, scratches, dirt and stains lurk on the corresponding surfaces and by slipping the items, the previously placed order is quickly there. The Moritz & Moritz non-slip mat protects floors of drawers, shelves and cupboards optimally from these unpleasant marks. For the perfect supply, you will receive the non-slip pad on four wheels, so you can easily cut the required format with scissors or cutter as desired. Also included are 20 self-adhesive blackboard labels for individual labelling of e.g. spice jars, bottles, storage boxes, cans.. Non-slip effect and perfect adhesion Our versatile non-slip mat is equipped with a nubbed, wipe-clean surface embossing, so soup ladle, spatulas etc. have no chance of slipping back and forth. Whether kitchen drawers and cabinets, shelves or dressers, car boot or caravan cabinet... The non-slip properties of the Moritz & Moritz insert mat keeps its contents in place and at the same time gives you a better overview. On smooth surfaces, the mat with non-slip effect is self-adhesive, so the use of adhesive tape is not required. Best non-slip properties, self-adhesive, washable and can be cut to size, non-toxic and odourless, 20 blackboard stickers included The quick solution If utensils are not fixed in drawers, cupboards, shelves, etc., damage and contamination of sensitive surfaces will occur quickly. The Moritz & Moritz non-slip mat offers a quick solution to the problem. No residue The material of our non-slip pad is robust and durable. Since the mat sticks without the use of adhesives, it can be removed from the surface at any time without leaving any residue. Cut, lay down and you're done The material of our non-slip pad is robust and durable. Since the mat sticks without the use of adhesives, it can be removed from the surface at any time without leaving any residue.
